description: This bag from kiara is a practical and stylish choice of bag. Extra roomy and comfortable to carry, the leather and bronze hardware give it sophisticated look. Height: 30 cm Width: 30 cm Depth: 10.5 cm Made of leatherite for durability Has one main zipped compartment with an internal zipper pocket, two pouches and a zippered separator Two handles Two pockets on the front Zipper pocket on back Two pockets on the sides Care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust
